hypothesis: Incorporating multi-modal electron beam condition parameters (dose rate, accelerating voltage, and acquisition frame rate) as explicit auxiliary inputs to the SAM-EM encoder during fine-tuning will enable the model to dynamically recalibrate its segmentation confidence thresholds in a physics-informed manner, thereby achieving superior mask fidelity and identity stability compared to image-only fine-tuning across the full experimental parameter space without requiring separate model retraining for each microscope configuration.
